caption: In a large indoor hall featuring high ceilings, warm lighting, and crystal chandeliers, a man performs a demonstration with a long staff. He is dressed in a blue traditional martial arts outfit consisting of a tunic and loose-fitting trousers. He stands on a dark blue carpeted floor in front of a seated audience of people in formal attire, including suits and dresses, who are watching from tables lined with red cloths. Across the sequence, the man dynamically swings the wooden staff in wide, sweeping motions. He starts by holding the staff aloft and angled, then brings it down in a powerful arc towards the floor, shifting his weight and stepping forward. By the final moments, he has rotated his body, continuing the fluid motion of the staff as he maintains a focused stance, while the background audience remains stationary and observant.
